title: Neural Network Control for Robotic Manipulators
authors: Zhang, Y., Li, S., Wang, H.
abstract: This paper presents a novel neural network control scheme for robotic manipulators with unknown dynamics.
ai_summary: 提出机器人机械臂的神经网络控制新方案，解决未知动力学问题。

title: Deep Learning Based Fault Detection in Power Systems
authors: Chen, X., Liu, W., Yang, R.
abstract: A deep learning approach for detecting faults in power distribution systems is proposed.
ai_summary: 基于深度学习的电力系统故障检测方法，准确率显著提升。
